title: Chemicals
description: High-purity laboratory chemicals, analytical reagents, solvents, and specialty compounds for research, quality control, and industrial applications.

subcategories.name: Analytical Reagents & Standards
subcategories.description: ACS, HPLC, and spectroscopy-grade reagents with certificate of analysis for precise quantitative and qualitative testing.

subcategories.name: Solvents & Solutions
subcategories.description: High-purity organic and inorganic solvents, buffer solutions, and volumetric standards for chromatography, titration, and sample preparation.

subcategories.name: Inorganic & Organic Compounds
subcategories.description: Laboratory-grade acids, bases, salts, and organic intermediates for synthesis, extraction, and general wet chemistry workflows.

subcategories.name: Specialty & Fine Chemicals
subcategories.description: Custom-synthesis precursors, biochemicals, and application-specific compounds for R&D, pharmaceutical, and materials science laboratories.
